name: Perfect Propose
original_name: パーフェクトプロポーズ
overview: Hiro, severely overworked, can barely function outside his toxic workplace. When he encounters Kai, a childhood friend he had once promised to marry, he finds he is steadily regaining a sense of purpose - yet Kai's motives remain unclear.

trailers.title: Perfect Propose | Official Trailer | Do you remember our promise to marry each other...?
